title: ophrys sphegodes var. helenae
intro: Ophrys sphegodes var. helenae, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a rare and endemic orchid species found in Greece and Turkey. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys sphegodes var. helenae include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Ophrys sphegodes var. helenae can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
